string.text: Eliminate the intruders at any cost.

We are besieged. Infidels wish to exploit the almighty Monolith. Driven by avarice. Ignorance. Base desires. On behalf of the Monolith, we act as guardians. Purge the infidels. Collect their badges, as a trophy. A sign of our unquestionable, superiority. Go, brother. Destroy them all.

We are besieged. Infidels wish to exploit the almighty Monolith. Driven by avarice. Ignorance. Base desires. On behalf of the Monolith, we act as guardians. Purge the infidels. Collect their badges, as a trophy. A sign of our unquestionable, superiority. Go, brother. Destroy them all. Acquire %s on your mission.
Such devotion to our glorious cause. Devotion shall be rewarded.

Dangerous, lethal beasts. A gift of the Zone, for us to behold. For us to take. Guardians, providers, as well as a milestone. A way to test our strength, resolve, and combat prowess. Go, brother. Hunt a mighty hunter. Man versus beast.

Dangerous, lethal beasts. A gift of the Zone, for us to behold. For us to take. Guardians, providers, as well as a milestone. A way to test our strength, resolve, and combat prowess. Go, brother. Hunt a mighty hunter. Man versus beast. Collect %s to prove your worth.
Excellent. Marvellous. A sight to behold. You have my gratitude, loyal brother.
There exist document, which speak of the wonders of the Zone. In detail. Secret knowledge, which the infidels must not know. Recover the documents. Bring them to me, and I shall reward you.
The Zone is safer, because of you.
Hunt for %s and return the meat to Rabbit.
I need you to do something for me. I need specific tools to tune our weapons.
Okay, I need a %s. Go, now.
You've done well. You are entitled to a greater selection of stock.
I need a set of advanced tools. Bring them to me and serve the Monolith. Better supplies will be your reward.
Good. YThis is what I needed. Return tomorrow and you will gain access to more tools to serve the will of the Monolith.
Good. This is what I needed. Thank you, brother. You will have access to every tool needed to become the perfect expression of Monolith's will.
Excellent work, brother. Your contributions have entitled you to supplies reserved for those who have proven their resourcefulness.
Excellent work, brother. Your contribution will grant you additional access to our stores. You have served well.
Outstanding work, brother. Rest assured, I will mention your contribution to our brothers. I will provide you with the finest implements for you to cleanse the Zone of infidels.
Thank you. Things won't be as stressful for the guys around here anymore. For your hard work, I'll give you access to some better stock.
Well done. Now I have a full set. Hey, you seem like the discerning type. As a reward, I'll make sure you get access to some real top-shelf supplies.
